headlines.title: Julio Rodriguez hits 2 HRs in spring training win
headlines.summary: Mariners star Julio Rodriguez showcased his power with two home runs in a 7-4 spring training victory over the Padres. The performance signals a strong start to his third MLB season.

last_game.highlights: Julio Rodriguez 2 HRs, Luis Castillo 5 IP, 1 ER

headlines.title: Seahawks sign veteran QB to backup Geno Smith
headlines.summary: The Seahawks signed former Steelers quarterback Mason Rudolph to a one-year deal, providing experienced depth behind Geno Smith. Rudolph started 4 games for Pittsburgh last season.

headlines.title: Kraken playoff push continues with win over Flames
headlines.summary: Seattle defeated Calgary 4-2 to maintain their hold on the final wild card spot in the Western Conference. Jared McCann scored his 28th goal of the season.

last_game.highlights: Jared McCann goal, Philipp Grubauer 32 saves

headlines.title: Sounders draw with LAFC in defensive battle
headlines.summary: Seattle and LAFC played to a 0-0 draw at Lumen Field. Stefan Frei made 6 saves to earn his first clean sheet of the season in a hard-fought defensive performance.
